title: Hadoop MapReduce Library
description: The 'lib' directory in Hadoop MapReduce architecture houses various Java classes that serve as crucial components of the MapReduce library. These components include field selection helpers, key-value text input formats, regular expression extraction mappers, and custom partitioners. The FieldSelectionHelper.java aids in selecting specific data fields for processing, enhancing efficiency. KeyValueLineRecordReader.java and KeyValueTextInputFormat.java handle key-value pairs in text files, while RegexMapper.java extracts text matching a regular expression. Custom partitioners like BinaryPartitioner.java and KeyFieldBasedPartitioner.java offer flexible key-based partitioning. These elements collaborate, employing patterns like Strategy, Factory, and Mapper, to read, split, prepare, and process data for MapReduce jobs, ensuring efficient and flexible data processing.
